problem id: c7077b21
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11010101 -> 01011101
  01010001 -> 00010101
  11101011 -> 10011110
  11011100 -> 01001101
  01110000 -> 00000111
  11011111 -> 00011101
  01001110 -> 00100100
  11011000 -> 10001101
  11010000 -> 00001101

query: 01100011
predicted answer: 00010110
